title: ChemicMystic (fan dlc)
description: This mod adds a lot of different things from new cow variants to new dimensions!!!
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9215fe0bab030138c6912b6955069e6ac4cf1a79.png)Welcome to ChemicMystic, a mod offering various features, including new fish, flowers, mob variants, chemicals and other things.




the mod was created by Matiwar, me 


the mod has not been fully done created in mcreator
I'll add the rest of the things in the future


                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                    



inspirations
Astroneer
HBM nuclear tech mod
rediscovered
subnautica
grow a garden
and others



these are the things this mod adds

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
ancient cobblestone
 
koi fish
 
merchants
 
new music disc
 
vials
 
new dimension magic world and black hole
 
new ender pearl crafting
 
new arrows
 
attchamens
 
lunaria noctis is a glowing flower
 
boompuff

stalker and mossy stalker

crates

blueprints

nyxium

salt

trail corridor

whisperoot

kyanite

jump block

antiblock

2 new cows variants

1 new pig variant

minecoin

blueprint table

mustard fish
</details>

### **this mod has been in beta version its so bugs**
